description: Composition Pink scooped neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, tape lining on the inside of the neckline and graphic print Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Consider every day a & ldquo good day& rdquo with this stylish T-shirt from lee. Show your love the brand and spread positivity. Pair this tee with denims and slip-on shoes for a girlie look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
